competitors.leaderboard: agentic-offensive leaders (exploitation-verified): XBOW (HackerOne US #1), strix (OSS), Horizon3 NodeZero
competitors.note: OWASP Juice Shop is the canonical deliberately-vulnerable SPA. Ground truth = its well-documented, stable-endpoint vulnerabilities (the OWASP Juice Shop challenge set). Agentic bar = a verified finding (working PoC), not a pattern match. tsengine target: detection_rate at OSS parity AND a competitive verified_rate, HITL-gated.
